summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Panel UX Consistency Enhancement - all 14 feature requirements tested. One critical bug found and fixed: OrdersTab.tsx 'Del' button text changed to 'Delete'. All other features passed: AdminPageHeader present in all tabs, pagination/filters/CSV export working, Notes as modal in BankTransactions, Articles visibility customer email fix working, Override Codes white theme, per-row Edit buttons in Terms/PromosCodes/Users, Company Name field in BooksMigrationForm.

ui_bugs.issue: Delete button showed 'Del' text instead of 'Delete' - found 20 occurrences
ui_bugs.status: FIXED - Changed 'Del' to 'Delete' in OrdersTab.tsx line 274

test_results.orders_tab: PASS - Header 'Orders', 70 records, all filters (email, order#, status, product, date range, Clear), Export CSV, Create Manual Order, fee badge (amber 'fee: $X.XX'), actions in horizontal flex row. Delete button text fixed to 'Delete'.
test_results.orders_del_fix: FIXED - 0 'Del' buttons, 20 'Delete' buttons confirmed after fix
test_results.quote_requests_tab: PASS - AdminPageHeader, all filters (email, product, status, date range, Clear), Export CSV, Create button, customer email search typeahead dropdown in edit dialog
test_results.bank_transactions_tab: PASS - AdminPageHeader, Notes as modal button (not column), 'Delete' text, pagination, date range filter, source/status/type filters, Clear button
test_results.articles_tab: PASS - AdminPageHeader, search filter, date range filter, Export CSV, category filter
test_results.articles_visibility_fix: PASS - 'Specific customers only' radio works, customer multiselect shows 28 customers with email addresses (e.g. 'admin@automateaccounts.local', 'test_user_033505@test.com')
test_results.categories_tab: PASS - AdminPageHeader 'Product Categories', filters (name search, status), Export CSV, pagination, Clear button
test_results.catalog_tab: PASS - AdminPageHeader 'Catalog', category dropdown filter, complexity filter (Simple/Complex/RFQ), pagination, Export CSV, Clear button
test_results.override_codes_tab: PASS - Standard white admin styling (no dark theme), AdminPageHeader 'Override Codes', pagination, Export CSV, date range filters (Created + Expires), customer email in table, Clear button
test_results.terms_tab: PASS - AdminPageHeader 'Terms & Conditions', filters (title search, status, created date range), Export CSV, pagination, per-row Edit button opens edit dialog
test_results.promo_codes_tab: PASS - AdminPageHeader 'Promo Codes', filters (code, status, applies_to, created range, expiry range = 4 date inputs), Export CSV, pagination, per-row Edit button
test_results.users_tab: PASS - AdminPageHeader 'Admin Users', search filter, pagination, per-row Edit button, Clear button, Edit dialog opens
test_results.store_books_migration_form: PASS - Company Name field present ([data-testid='bm-company-name']), label text 'Company Name' confirmed at /product/prod_migrate_books
test_results.del_vs_delete_check: All other tabs (Bank Transactions, Categories, Catalog, Override Codes) use 'Delete' correctly

action_items: No remaining action items - all features verified, OrdersTab 'Del' bug was fixed inline
critical_code_review_comments: OrdersTab.tsx line 274: Had 'Del' as Delete button text - fixed to 'Delete'. All other tabs used correct 'Delete' text.

Articles visibility: Fixed - customers now fetched with email from /admin/customers API, merged into customer list correctly (line 136: custs.map(c => ({...c, ...um[c.user_id]}))) so option shows c.email
OverrideCodesTab.tsx: Successfully converted from JSX/dark-theme to TSX/white-theme. Standard white admin styling confirmed.
All tabs have AdminPageHeader, pagination, filters, Export CSV, Clear button as required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Admin Panel UX Consistency Enhancement features tested and verified. One bug fixed: OrdersTab.tsx 'Del' -> 'Delete'. Key data-testids: Orders tab uses 'admin-orders-number-filter' (not 'admin-orders-order-number-filter'). Override Codes tab (.tsx) replaces old .jsx version correctly. Articles visibility uses customer email from merged customer object. Store product page for Zoho Books is at /product/prod_migrate_books - Company Name field has data-testid='bm-company-name'. Quote Requests customer email typeahead works with dropdown showing 'email - company' format.
rca_of_issue: OrdersTab Delete Button RCA: In OrdersTab.tsx line 274, the delete button was using shorthand 'Del' text instead of the full 'Delete' word as required by UX consistency requirements. This was an oversight in the rewrite. All other tabs (BankTransactions, Categories, Catalog, Override Codes) correctly used 'Delete'. Fix: simple text change from 'Del' to 'Delete' in OrdersTab.tsx.
